synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-1608 Moderate: Oracle Linux 7 glib2 security update
description:
[2.56.1-9.0.3]
- Fixes CVE-2025-13601  g_escape_uri_string() overflow [Orabug: 38909821]

[2.56.1-9.0.1]
- Fix overflow of GDBusConnection serial [Orabug: 38666376]
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-1608

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-1608.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 7 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
glib2-2.56.1-9.0.3.el7_9.i686.rpm
glib2-2.56.1-9.0.3.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
glib2-devel-2.56.1-9.0.3.el7_9.i686.rpm
glib2-devel-2.56.1-9.0.3.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
glib2-doc-2.56.1-9.0.3.el7_9.noarch.rpm
glib2-fam-2.56.1-9.0.3.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
glib2-static-2.56.1-9.0.3.el7_9.i686.rpm
glib2-static-2.56.1-9.0.3.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
glib2-tests-2.56.1-9.0.3.el7_9.x86_64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol7/SRPMS-updates/glib2-2.56.1-9.0.3.el7_9.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-13601




Description of changes:

[2.56.1-9.0.3]
- Fixes CVE-2025-13601  g_escape_uri_string() overflow [Orabug: 38909821]

[2.56.1-9.0.1]
- Fix overflow of GDBusConnection serial [Orabug: 38666376]
